data.title: TRUMP token -15% since dinner as 40% of guests dump by dessert
data.description:
Donald Trump’s memecoin offered brief utility as a way to gain access to a dinner. Now that the event has passed, the token is crashing.
source: https://protos.com/trump-token-15-since-dinner-as-40-of-guests-dump-by-dessert/

data.title: Publicly Traded Semler Scientific Buys More Bitcoin as Law Firm Targets Company
data.description:
The Nasdaq-listed Semler Scientific now holds $466 million worth of Bitcoin, but is facing an investigation from a law firm.
source: https://decrypt.co/321862/semler-scientific-buys-bitcoin-law-firm-targets

data.title: Pi Network token makes derivatives debut on Kraken with perpetual futures offering 20x leverage
data.description:
Kraken has introduced perpetual futures contracts for Pi Network’s native token, PI, allowing traders to speculate on its price with up to 20x leverage, according to a May 23 announcement. The listing marks the token’s first appearance on a major derivatives platform. However, it failed to create positive momentum for the token’s price
source: https://cryptoslate.com/pi-network-token-makes-derivatives-debut-on-kraken-with-perpetual-futures-offering-20x-leverage/

data.title: Exclusive: Armando Pantoja alleges JPMorgan manipulated Bitcoin market entry
data.description:
Armando Pantoja says Dimon’s anti-Bitcoin stance was designed to keep prices low while JPMorgan amassed digital assets.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/exclusive-armando-pantoja-alleges-jpmorgan-manipulated-bitcoin-market-entry

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: No HODLing For Congress, 48% Say Elected Members Shouldn't Be Able To Buy Cryptocurrency
data.description:
So far, cryptocurrency is not outlined in the proposed P. E. L. O. S. I. Act, a bill that would ban members of Congress from buying and selling stocks, options and ETFs. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/25/05/45594252/exclusive-no-hodling-for-congress-48-say-elected-members-shouldnt-be-able-to-buy?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: Bitcoin whale James Wynn pushes 40x long position to $1.07 billion
data.description:
James Wynn, a pseudonymous crypto trader known for swinging massive positions on-chain, has expanded his Bitcoin long bet to $1. 07 billion using 40x leverage on Hyperliquid, the decentralized derivatives platform. The final scale-up was shared by James via X on Friday, with a screenshot that showed the total exposure was pegged at 974. 44634 BTC, entered […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-whale-james-wynn-long-position-1-07b/

data.title: Changpeng Zhao Debunks WSJ Report on His Alleged Involvement in Trump-Linked Crypto Firm
data.description:
Changpeng Zhao has dismissed a Wall Street Journal report depicting him as a fixer for Trump-linked World Liberty Financial, insisting he merely attended meetings already set by others. The dispute has reignited debate over media bias, token sale ethics and regulators’ scrutiny of political tokens.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/changpeng-zhao-debunks-wsj-report-on-his-alleged-involvement-in-trump-linked-crypto-firm/

data.title: Thief Behind Massive Coinbase Exploit Swaps Stolen Crypto and Trolls On-Chain Sleuth ZachXBT
data.description:
The thief behind the massive Coinbase exploit earlier this month has begun swapping their stolen crypto. On Wednesday, pseudonymous on-chain investigator ZachXBT noted on Telegram that the exploiter had swapped $42. 5+ million worth of Bitcoin (BTC) into Ethereum (ETH) via the decentralized liquidity protocol THORChain (RUNE)
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/23/thief-behind-massive-coinbase-exploit-swaps-stolen-crypto-and-trolls-on-chain-sleuth-zachxbt/

data.title: Scott Bessent says Trump is pushing to strip Harvard’s tax-exempt status
data.description:
Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Friday that President Trump is now actively moving to take away Harvard University’s tax-exempt status, escalating the federal government’s confrontation with the elite school. Speaking during a live interview with Bloomberg, Scott claimed that Harvard might have violated rules required to keep its tax privileges. “We will see if […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-to-strip-harvards-tax-exempt-status/

data.title: JPMorgan, Bank of America, Citi and Wells Fargo Weighing Joint Stablecoin Launch: Wall Street Journal Report
data.description:
Top US banks are considering teaming up on a stablecoin, according to a Wall Street Journal report. JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Citigroup, Wells Fargo, Early Warning Services (operator of Zelle) and the Clearing House, among other commercial banks, are reportedly in talks to develop a stablecoin to compete with the cryptocurrency industry.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/23/jpmorgan-bank-of-america-citi-and-wells-fargo-weighing-joint-stablecoin-launch-wall-street-journal-report/

data.title: Crypto market braces for impact amid Trump’s tense global tariff negotiations
data.description:
Cryptocurrencies have seen a sudden dip as Trump proposes a 50% tariff on EU goods. Bitcoin (BTC) has dropped by 4% while Ethereum (ETH) has dropped by over 3%. As the market braces for tariffs’ impact, the recently held TRUMP memecoin gala dinner has stirred controversy and market volatility
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/crypto-market-braces-for-impact-amid-trumps-tense-global-tariff-negotiations/

data.title: 'Off the Grid' NFT Sales Heating Up as Avalanche Game Plots Expansion to Steam
data.description:
Off the Grid items are selling for thousands of dollars as the game is set to expand to Steam—but how will its crypto elements be handled?
source: https://decrypt.co/321838/off-grid-avalanche-nft-sales-steam-expansion

data.title: Oracle Plans $40 Billion Nvidia Chip Purchase for OpenAI Data Center
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Oracle is set to invest $40 billion in acquiring Nvidia chips to support OpenAI's new data center in the United States. This strategic move aims to enhance the capabilities and performance of OpenAI's infrastructure, leveraging Nvidia's advanced technology. The acquisition underscores Oracle's commitment to expanding its technological resources and supporting innovative AI developments.

data.title: Analyst Says Full-Blown Altseason Has Started, Outlines Path Forward for Dogecoin, Floki and Pepe
data.description:
An analyst known for making timely crypto calls believes that altcoins may have now entered a massive uptrend after Bitcoin (BTC) hit new all-time highs this week. Pseudonymous analyst Bluntz tells his 306,000 followers on the social media platform X that altcoins may start outperforming Bitcoin as the digital assets are suddenly flashing bullish.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/05/23/analyst-says-full-blown-altseason-has-started-outlines-path-forward-for-dogecoin-floki-and-pepe/
